summary: P1.8-10 reopen: Shop Health SPS/AHR two-tone pink ramp bars with threshold ticks; Today's Report collapsed to 3 tabs with Real/Estimated interactive bars (no sparklines or text CTAs); fixed metric→workflow mapping via metric-action-mapping.ts.

interfaceChanges.description: Replaced sparkline series with Real/Estimated bar fields; REPORT_DOMAIN_IDS reduced to 3 tabs.
Authoritative metric→workflow mapping and Shop Health fallthrough resolution.
Shared two-tone bar with clickable Estimated segment and optional threshold ticks.

mappings.criterion: Shop Health renders SPS/AHR as two-tone health bars with pink ramp and SPS threshold ticks
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::renders Shop Health SPS/AHR as two-tone bars with estimated affordance

mappings.criterion: Daily Report shows exactly 3 domain tabs
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::renders exactly three Daily Report domain tabs

mappings.criterion: Growth tab revenue units ROAS Real/Estimated bars Estimated click budget_optimization
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::renders growth metrics as Real/Estimated bars linked to budget_optimization

mappings.criterion: Product tab SKU count bar Estimated click product_scaling fallback npl
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::maps new-shop workflows to product and shop health anchors

mappings.criterion: Inventory and Refunds tab low-stock and refund metrics with distinct action targets
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::links inventory and refund metrics to distinct workflow actions

mappings.criterion: No static text CTAs growth metrics Real Estimated budget_optimization
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::renders growth metrics as Real/Estimated bars linked to budget_optimization

mappings.criterion: exposes chart test ids without npm chart dependencies data-testid
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::exposes chart test ids without npm chart dependencies

mappings.criterion: maps growth persona workflows consolidated 3-tab anchors journey registry
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_journey_loop_registry.test.ts::maps growth persona workflows to the consolidated 3-tab anchors
web/src/__tests__/test_issue217_home_reward_charts.test.tsx::exposes chart test ids without npm chart dependencies
